message:
fix: remove ZFC-violating decision engine from degraded boot triage (gt-mcw2)

runDegradedTriage implemented a full multi-level Go decision engine
(heartbeat staleness thresholds, idle detection, backoff label parsing,
molecule progress tracking) that replaced agent judgment. Per ZFC
(Agent decides. Go transports.), these decisions belong in the Boot
agents mol-boot-triage formula, not in Go code.

Reduced runDegradedTriage to mechanical-only checks: shutdown detection,
warrant execution, and session existence. Removed helper functions
isDeaconInBackoff, getDeaconHookBead, getMoleculeLastActivity and their
corresponding tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
